title: Consolidated Dashboard across multiple domains

posts.author: Sathish212 (Sathish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Team,

We have users logging via multiple domain(s), under each domains we are several users and doing the project management, tracking and dashboards individually within the domain.

Our requirement is to consolidate the project dashboards at a high-level across multiple domains and showcase it in one single dashboard for executive management review, rather than logging into each domain area and need to find the status.

Is this possible to be developed in Monday.com itself, if not is there any tool you suggest like Power BI/Automate to integrate with Monday.com with multiple domains and pull the data and have a consolidated dashboards in Power Platform shown for executive management review. If it is not possible in Power Platform any other recommendations.

I appreciate the response in advance. This will help us decide do we need to stick to Monday.comand expand our user base or move to alternative platform who can provide this feature.

Thanks,
Sathish
